title: [Wax Poetic]
description: Leafy garlands of cire lace florals drape along the upper beams of the arched wagon, the vibrantly colored flowers gathered in ribbon-tied loops.  A honeycomb-shaped display stands at the center of the shop, flanked on either side by a pair of comically large statues of plump honeybees caught in dramatic poses, each insect dusted in gold and amber glitter.
